labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 561730 ($45,367,770,541) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 561730 ($118,363,300,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[56]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $152,919 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 561730); class <5: 82,695 firms, avg revenue/firm $299,970 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $46,945 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 16,643 firms, avg revenue/firm $933,160 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $146,040 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 8,936 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,879,235 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $294,100 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 5,888 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,038,071 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $788,458 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 593 firms, avg revenue/firm $22,899,949 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,583,842 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 87 firms, avg revenue/firm $206,781,494 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $32,361,304 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 593
